analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §2.2-§2.3 (scoring, divergence certificate, primary endpoint, decision rule) + build block poc/engine-inference/asm-1990-2009.json (ASM-1994/1997/1999/2000 operationalisations)

arms_mandatory_baselines: D-word-dom (word-level dictionary, the pi:011 shape — matched comparator per the rules-2-knull construction)
B-wn (best non-kernel source constructible without kernel authoring — beating only D-word arms licenses at most 'sense-split typing beats word-level typing', never 'kernel-specific value'; ASM-1956)
oracle (gold injected through the pinned scorer; scorer-validity arm, PC-5)

kernel-as-text: structurally NOT-APPLICABLE — no LLM/host consumer exists anywhere in the instrument, no prompt surface for the text to enter; recorded per blocking-pilot protocol §2 with the flag carried in the pinned pilot artifact (best verdict PILOT-PASS-WITH-FLAGS, ASM-1963)

dependent_vars.definition: exact match of the engine verdict {CONSISTENT, ANOMALOUS(ERR_CONFLICT), REFUSE(code)} against the pinned deterministic gold, with the ASM-1997 G4 rule (REFUSE or vacuous-CONSISTENT correct; ANOMALOUS = confident wrong assertion)
dependent_vars.name: closure_correctness

dependent_vars.definition: Div(K,b) full-signature and decision-level counts with per-op (O1/O2/O3) and per-lemma composition — the committed divergence certificate (design §2.3; ASM-1851 re-activation artifact) [better: n/a — instrument diagnostic]
dependent_vars.name: divergence_counts

dependent_vars.definition: issue-#18-direction secondary separating D-word-dom's confident wrongness from K's fail-closed refusals; penalty form fixed at freeze (ASM-1997)
dependent_vars.name: honesty_weighted_penalty

levels: K (kernel-v1 Stage-A senses + data/axioms-engineinf-v0 explication-derived hard module)
K-shuf (mandatory shuffled-kernel control: domain/range deranged within lemma, ASM-1996)
D-word-dom (plain word-level dictionary, SemCor-dominant-sense signature, ASM-1993)
D-word-union (plain word-level dictionary, union/LCS signature = untyped)
B-wn (WordNet-3.1-bytes-only sense-split arm, sentence-frame typing, ASM-1995 — the kernel-specificity decider)
independent_vars.name: typing_source

n_planned.note: deterministic engine => no seeds; double-run byte-identity required (certificate discipline)

smallest_effect_of_interest.type: absolute paired delta in closure-correctness (K minus B-wn) on the primary divergent frame

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (kernel-specificity, design §2.3): paired exact contrast K - B-wn closure-correctness on the primary divergent frame Div_dec(K, B-wn) ∩ (G1∪G3) (ASM-1999). Deterministic per-item 0/1 census over the finite WN31-gloss-example item frame; PASS-affirm additionally requires /analysis/k_pri_wilson_lb95 >= 0.80, /analysis/delta_k_minus_bwn_lb95 > 0 (exact-binomial, ASM-2000), K > b on both D-word arms' divergent frames, and /analysis/no_net_harm_ok (convergent-frame correctness within 0.02 of every baseline). Both readings pre-registered in hypotheses H-EI-1/H-EI-2 before any registered byte is scored.
capped claim ladder (design §2.3): a K win over D-word arms alone licenses at most 'sense-split typing beats word-level typing at this scope' — never 'kernel-specific value'
descriptive honesty-weighted score per arm (correct 0 / refusal 0.5 / wrong assertion 1, ASM-1997): separates D-word-dom's confident wrongness from K's fail-closed refusals
shuffled-kernel control activity (descriptive; the binding control gate is pilot PC-3)

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Every claim is scoped to the Stage-A inventory (11 senses over 4 lemmas, 212 compiled items from WN31 gloss examples) at input grade S: typed closure correctness DOWNSTREAM of third-party sense identification — in-engine sense identification is the E1 increment and is not claimed. Items are compiled worlds, not parsed text: NO natural-language robustness claim (the l3a parse wall stands), NO host claim, NO deployment claim, NO training-time claim, and NO programme-thesis verdict — this is one seam made askable. G3 anomaly labels are constructed-rule gold over third-party bytes and are disclosed as such in every claim sentence; the deflationary readings do not depend on G3. Wilson/exact-binomial lower bounds are reported solely for the pre-registered generalization to the Stage-B lemma frame and any such statement must carry the EXTRAPOLATION tag. The envelope licenses nothing beyond these scoped sentences.
hypotheses: H-EI-1 (kernel-win, pre-registered reading): on the primary divergent frame (decision-level Div(K, B-wn) restricted to G1/G3 cells, ASM-1999), the kernel arm's closure-correctness satisfies the PASS-affirm band (K Wilson-LB95 >= 0.80; K - B-wn >= +0.20 with exact-binomial LB95 > 0; K beats both D-word arms; no net harm on the convergent frame). Licensed sentence, scoped: 'On this inventory, where kernel-v1's sense-split typing derives engine closures that matched non-kernel sources do not, the kernel's closures are the correct ones by third-party-derived gold.' This would be the programme's FIRST kernel-specific-value datum (design §3).

H-EI-2 (no-win, pre-registered D3(b) reframe trigger, verbatim per design §2.3): 'where the kernel's closure diverges from matched non-kernel closures, it is not more correct; the kernel's distinctive contribution remains unlocated; the programme thesis reframes per D3(b) — grounded content + certified engine, not kernel-specific structure.' Fires on FAIL-deflate (B-wn matches/beats K on the divergent frame, or K < D-word-dom on Div(K, D-word-dom)); KILL-e2 (closures converge, |Div| < 10) is the same deflationary family recorded as 'sense structure suffices; kernel authoring adds no divergent closure here'. An honest, valuable outcome, not an instrument failure.

H-EI-3 (instrument): the divergence seam is non-vacuous at the operating point — verified pre-freeze by the blocking pilot PC-2 (|Div(K, D-word-dom)| >= 6 and |Div(K, B-wn)| >= 3 on the pilot slice) and re-checked at campaign scale by KILL-e1.
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-e1 (vacuity; verdict CONSTRUCTION-ANOMALY): |Div_full(K, D-word-dom)| < 25 at the operating point, or the divergent cells span < 3 closure ops or < 3 lemmas — the instrument cannot ask; no verdict either direction; extend the inventory (Stage-B senses) or accept the question as closed-deflationary at kernel scale. KILL-e2 (convergence-deflation; verdict NULL): |Div_dec(K, B-wn) ∩ (G1∪G3)| < 10 — the kernel-vs-mechanical-sense-typing question is unaskable at this inventory; recorded as a D3(b) input ('sense structure suffices; kernel authoring adds no divergent closure here'), no affirmative claim. Also binding: a fired PASS or FAIL band is read ONLY through the pre-registered sentences in hypotheses H-EI-1/H-EI-2.

artifact_hashes.campaign-rows(poc/engine-inference/resul: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: emitted by the frozen runner at the registered X.run; the runner's run-log pins rows_path/rows_sha256 which the pinned stdin analysis re-verifies fail-closed
artifact_hashes.campaign-run-result(poc/engine-inference: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: emitted by the frozen runner at the registered X.run (double-run determinism sha inside)

blocking_pilot.pilot_mock_artifact: poc/engine-inference/results/mock-validation.json (MOCK mechanics validation incl. the stdin analysis verdict path on synthetic PASS-shaped and DEFLATE-shaped rows; never satisfies the freeze gate)
blocking_pilot.role: PRE-FREEZE GATE (blocking-pilot-before-freeze protocol, ASM-1830/1831; design §5): mode REAL, CPU, $0, 17-item deterministic slice, executed 2026-07-12 BEFORE freeze. PC-1 no-degenerate-arm PASS; PC-2 separation non-vacuous PASS (|Div(K,D-word-dom)|=16, |Div(K,B-wn)|=14, 3 closure ops, >=2 lemmas — the non-vacuous-divergence existence proof, the anti-knull gate); PC-3 controls non-degenerate PASS (K-shuf differs on 5/9 typing-active divergent cells with the predicted signature; D-union != D-dom); PC-4 gate-teeth PASS (planted range flip fires exactly on predicted cells; poisoned-gold canary silent on the real compiler, tripped by the planted gold-reading compiler; kernel-module provenance G2-independent); PC-5 elicitable-gold PASS (yield 0.978, oracle 1.0, double-run sha match). FLAG kernel_as_text_na (structural, ASM-1963). Pilot numbers are instrument-validity data ONLY, never campaign evidence (ASM-1835).

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

runner_constraints.channel: DETERMINISTIC CPU only — no model call, no network, no GPU; worst-case $0 model spend under the $2 cap
runner_constraints.procedure: verify every pin against the frozen entry fail-closed; --dry-plan first; run poc/engine-inference/engineinf_runner.py; double-run byte-identity required; log rows_path/rows_sha256 in the run record artifacts for the pinned stdin analysis; mechanical verdict-gen only; the builder's pre-freeze exploratory execution (ASM-1990) is quarantined and is NOT the registered run

title: ENGINE-INF E0 (maintainer issue #26 items D2+D3): engine inference under typing on a deliberately constructed DIVERGENCE SEAM — on items where kernel-v1's sense-split per-sense typing and matched non-kernel sources (word-level dictionary dominant/union, WordNet-frame mechanical sense typing) derive DIVERGENT closures over the certified RULES-1 deterministic engine, whose closure is correct by third-party-derived gold? Fully deterministic channel: pinned bytes -> certified twin engine -> string-equality scoring; no LLM, no host, no judge anywhere. Simultaneously the programme's first direct test of typing->correct-engine-conclusions AND the first askable kernel-specificity contrast (ASM-1939(a)/ASM-1950); the committed divergence certificate doubles as the ASM-1851 re-activation artifact.
